name: Shoshoni Yoga Retreat
description: Shoshoni Yoga Retreat is an ashram and retreat center in Rollinsville, Colorado, in the Rocky Mountain foothills west of Boulder. Founded in 1988, it offers yoga retreats, meditation, Ayurvedic spa treatments, and residential programs. The center follows the tradition of classical yoga and Advaita Vedanta, emphasizing meditation, self-inquiry, and devotional practice.
